creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
Just hit this "bomb" on my dev machine. Has no idea what service is causing it and it looks very scary as the box is not responding even on the kvm. I can switch consoles so the kernel is still operational, but nothing I type gets into the login, so the only recourse is the hard reset or power cycle.

I would say until the proper solution is found the interim relief is to kill the offending PID. Yes there might be some collateral damage, but the system is already fc'ed up badly at that point, so it's better than nothing.

P.S. there were nothing suspicious in the logs either after reboot.
